title: buglossum angustifolium
intro: Buglossum angustifolium, also known as Blue Bugloss, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats and coughs, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Blue Bugloss can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in the production of cough syrups and other medicinal preparations.
